# Evil Clanker

> Evil-clanker is a public MIT-licensed fork of the clanker conversation-state engine, with target zones retuned for heretic / informational LLM steering. Same deterministic 7D VADUGWI engine (4,544-word vocabulary, 61 structural patterns, 0.17ms per sentence). Designed to be wired into chat templates so a language model receives an explicit emotional-state header and a target-zone goal at runtime.

## Core Documentation

- [Full AI Reference](llms-full.txt): Self-contained reference for AI agents
- [README](README.md): Human-facing overview and quick start
- [Specification](SPEC.md): Full engine specification
- [Theory](docs/THEORY.md): Research paper on structural pattern recognition

## Architecture

- [VADUGWI Calculation](docs/vadug-calculation.md): Complete formula reference
- [Physics Rules](docs/v3-user-physics.md): Structural rules the engine encodes
- [Linguistic Devices](docs/linguistic-devices-taxonomy.md): Taxonomy of handled devices

## API

- [Engine Entry Point](engine/pendulum.py): 9-stage physics pipeline
- [Bidirectional Solver](engine/solver.py): A+B=C forward and backward resolution
- [Force Flow](engine/force_flow.py): WHO does WHAT to WHOM

## Contributing

- [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Security Policy](SECURITY.md): Vulnerability reporting

## Related

- Upstream sibling repo (AGPL-3.0): https://github.com/deucebucket/clanker
- Upstream HuggingFace demo: https://huggingface.co/spaces/deucebucket/clanker
